compiled_state.title: Fix: test-ticket-clarity-check.sh does not validate threshold field in JSON output
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: The test file does not assert presence of the 'threshold' field or validate it is an integer within expected bounds, per the ticket-clarity-check-output.md contract.

comments.body: Investigation: test-ticket-clarity-check.sh does not exist yet. This is part of epic 0d66-ceb6 which is in_progress. The script and test have not been implemented. This bug is premature — the test cannot validate the threshold field because neither the test nor the script exist. Closing as the parent epic tracks this work.
comments.author: Test
